title: Bundleable
description: A Datapack that lets you pick up Mobs with a Bundle of your choice. Or launch the mob as a projectile with a Crossbow/Dispenser!
body:
## Features 
- **Pick up Mobs**💼: RIGHT-CLICK any entity with a bundle to pick it up. RIGHT-CLICK again to release it. 

    [_For Mobs with interaction⚠️: Press SHIFT *OR* just go a bit further away_]
‎ 

‎ 

- **Launch Mobs**🏹: Put the filled bundle in your **offhand** and charge a **CROSSBOW** to launch the mob as a projectile! You can even use **DISPENSERS** to shoot them!
‎ 

‎ 

- **[NEW] Dynamic Names**🔤: Bundles dynamically update their **Name** to match the mob captured inside. 

  [_For example: Cow Bundle or Sheep Bundle. Works in every MC version now! >=V3.0.0_]

<details>
<summary>Blacklist</summary>
  
**Mobs**
- Player
- Ender Dragon
- Illusioner
- Mannequins
________________________________________________________________________________________________
**Other**

- boat
- arrows
- impact_projectiles

- block_display

________________________________________________________________________________________________
### Credits📝
This is an official update for the "_Bundles pick up mobs!_" datapack, originally created by **Twaj**🚀 on Planet Minecraft. This version is continued with his/her permission.

________________________________________________________________________________________________
### Compatibility
**Works on Servers!✅**

**Keeps NBT Data!✅**

Bundleable is developed for Minecraft **1.21.2 - 26.1.2**.


**Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/rXnr7XHRg8) server for Bug reports or feature suggestions :)**
